# Tasks

Approved for implementation: no

## Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Write failing tests for the first behavior.
- [ ] Run the new test and confirm it fails for the expected reason.
- [ ] Implement the smallest change that satisfies the test.
- [ ] Run the test and confirm it passes.
- [ ] Update the E2E Coverage Matrix in `plan.md`.
- [ ] Update all affected README/runbook/template docs.
- [ ] Update `handoff.md` with detailed usage and test instructions.
- [ ] Run `bash ops/dev-gate.sh docs/ai-dev/<YYYY-MM-DD-topic>` for local ignored feature notes.
- [ ] Run repository verification.
- [ ] Commit a coherent change.

## High-Risk Stops
- [ ] Confirm before destructive database operations.
- [ ] Confirm before production deployment.
- [ ] Confirm before payment or secret changes.
- [ ] Confirm before modifying `vendor/new-api` core source.
